title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost-management SaaS company with HQ in Tel Aviv and New York, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine, reporting to the CRO. Requires 7+ years in RevOps/Sales Ops/Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR. A hands-on leader-doer comfortable owning executive strategy while building flows, dashboards, and data models in globally distributed teams.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech aligns perfectly with Finout's domain, deep Salesforce expertise matches core needs, and hybrid Tel Aviv/NY structure fits Omri's location preferences. Only minor gap is no explicit mention of $30M+ ARR scaling experience in profile, but seniority level strongly suggests capability.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of RevOps opening and thought of you immediately—you're exactly the hands-on leader-doer they're describing. Your 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM operations and deep Salesforce chops align perfectly with what they're building in cloud cost management, and the Tel Aviv/NY hybrid model seems tailor-made for your location flexibility. Would love to connect you with their CRO if this resonates.

title: Manager, Revenue Operations
description: Embrace, a remote-first company, is hiring a Revenue Operations Manager to own and optimize its Salesforce and RevOps stack (Salesforce, HubSpot, Gong, LeanData, Apollo, Clay). The role streamlines data flow across Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success, designs operational processes like forecasting, pipeline reviews, territory design, comp planning, lead routing, and attribution, and builds dashboards for pipeline health and sales efficiency. Requires 5+ years in Revenue/Sales Operations or GTM Analytics in B2B SaaS, admin-level Salesforce proficiency, and a builder's mindset with strong collaboration skills.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years experience exceeds 5+ requirement, direct Salesforce/HubSpot admin expertise, deep RevOps/GTM background with proven pipeline forecasting and operational design skills. Remote-first aligns perfectly with preferences.
ai_opener: I've spent 15+ years building and scaling RevOps functions in B2B SaaS—from Salesforce architecture to pipeline forecasting and cross-functional process design. Embrace's stack (Salesforce, HubSpot, Gong, LeanData) is exactly what I've optimized repeatedly, and your focus on streamlining data flow across Sales, Marketing, and CS resonates with how I think about revenue operations.

title: RevOps Lead
description: Oliv.AI, a San Francisco-headquartered SalesTech startup building AI agents for sales (recently raised $5.2M seed), is hiring a RevOps Lead to be the operational backbone of its go-to-market engine. You'll work hands-on across Marketing, Sales, and Customer Success to ensure revenue processes, systems, and data are clean, aligned, and built to scale. Requires startup/SaaS experience, strong project management skills, exposure to sales forecasting, quota support, and pipeline analytics, plus familiarity with automation tools and data modeling. Offers competitive comp, equity, and a flexible remote setup.
score_reason: Strong alignment with RevOps Lead role, AI-native GTM focus, and startup scaling phase. Well-matched on forecasting, pipeline analytics, and cross-functional process building, though early-stage funding ($5.2M) suggests lower cash compensation than typical for a 15+ year executive.
ai_opener: Oliv AI's mission to build AI agents for sales resonates deeply—I've spent 15+ years building RevOps functions that scale GTM engines, and I see enormous potential in automating the operational backbone that typically holds sales teams back. With your recent $5.2M raise and focus on SalesTech, you're at the inflection point where clean data, predictable forecasting, and cross-functional alignment become your competitive moat. I'd love to explore how my experience architecting Salesforce/HubSpot ecosystems and building pipeline predictability could accelerate your path to product-market fit.

title: GTM Engineer
description: WorkOS, a well-funded developer-tools company ($100M raised) serving customers like OpenAI, Cursor, and Vercel, seeks a GTM Engineer to architect and operate its commercial tools, ensuring integration, automation, and data hygiene across Salesforce, Apollo, HubSpot, and Clay. You'll partner with Sales, Marketing, and Customer Success to optimize lead routing, account scoring, AI-driven prospecting, and pipeline hygiene. Requires 4+ years in Revenue/Sales/GTM Operations and strong admin-level Salesforce expertise. Fully remote with a base salary range of $160,000–$185,000 plus equity and benefits.
score_reason: Excellent match: 15+ years exceeds 4+ year requirement, GTM Engineer role aligns perfectly with RevOps expertise, and the tech stack (Salesforce, HubSpot, Apollo, Clay) matches core competencies. AI-native GTM, pipeline hygiene, and account scoring are direct strengths.
ai_opener: WorkOS's developer-tools GTM caught my attention—the focus on commercial automation across Salesforce, HubSpot, and Apollo aligns directly with my 15+ years architecting RevOps motions at scale. Having built AI-driven lead routing and account scoring systems that significantly improved pipeline quality, I'd be excited to help WorkOS scale its go-to-market engine as you grow beyond OpenAI and Cursor.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Teleport seeks a technically-minded, creative GTM Engineer for its Marketing team to scale the go-to-market engine, blending engineering thinking with growth strategy using AI, automation, and data. You'll build workflows to capture GTM signals (hiring trends, job changes, account events), automate data enrichment and ABM research, and create automations responding to inbound engagement. Requires familiarity with B2B martech stacks (Salesforce, HubSpot/Marketo, Clearbit, Outreach), automation tools (Clay, Zapier, Make, Workato), APIs and webhooks. Base salary $112,800–$141,000 depending on location and level.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's RevOps/GTM engineering expertise, B2B SaaS background, and proficiency in Salesforce, HubSpot, and automation tools. The AI-native GTM focus and data-driven signal capture directly match his strengths, though the role sits slightly on the marketing operations side versus pure revenue operations.
ai_opener: Omri Gonen here—I've spent 15+ years architecting GTM engines in B2B SaaS, and Teleport's approach to automating hiring intelligence and ABM workflows through Clay/Zapier automation really resonates with how I think about scaling revenue signals. Your stack (Salesforce, HubSpot, Clearbit, Outreach) is exactly what I've optimized extensively, and I'd love to discuss how to turn raw intent data into predictable pipeline at scale.

title: GTM RevOps Engineer
description: Liatrio is hiring a GTM RevOps Engineer to design and maintain automated workflows across prospecting, lead enrichment, scoring, routing, and follow-up sequences, and to build integrations across its GTM stack (HubSpot, sales engagement platforms, data enrichment tools). This is not a CRM admin role—they want someone who writes code, builds integrations, and architects net-new AI-powered systems. Requires familiarity with no-code/low-code automation (Make, n8n, Zapier, Workato), enrichment tools (Clay, ZoomInfo, Apollo), B2B SaaS GTM motion knowledge, and demonstrated experience shipping AI-assisted workflows via LLM APIs.

Gap: no explicit mention of coding proficiency or hands-on no-code/low-code automation platforms (Make, n8n, Workato) in profile—this is a builder role requiring technical depth beyond traditional RevOps management.
ai_opener: Omri, I'm reaching out because Liatrio's GTM RevOps Engineer role sits at the intersection of revenue operations strategy and AI-native systems design—exactly where modern GTM teams are moving. With your 15+ years architecting B2B SaaS go-to-market motions and deep HubSpot/Salesforce expertise, you have the operational foundation this needs. I'd love to explore whether your background includes hands-on integration and workflow automation work to validate the technical fit.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Teramind, a fully-remote user-behavior-analytics platform serving Fortune 500 companies, seeks a GTM Engineer to support its AI enablement journey. The role owns GTM infrastructure and process enablement—designing and maintaining workflows for ABM, lead scoring, lead nurture, and pipeline management—and serves as primary administrator for HubSpot CRM, Marketing, and Sales Hubs. Requires 3+ years in Revenue/Sales/Marketing Ops (preferably SaaS or eCommerce), hands-on HubSpot administration and automation, proficiency with tools like Instantly, Clay, Zapier, and n8n, plus strong analytical and API/data-integration skills. Fully remote, work from anywhere.
score_reason: Exceptional match: GTM Engineer role directly aligns with Omri's RevOps expertise, HubSpot mastery, and AI-native GTM experience. 15+ years in B2B SaaS far exceeds 3+ year requirement, and fully remote location is ideal.
ai_opener: Teramind's AI enablement journey resonates deeply—I've spent 15+ years architecting GTM infrastructure and HubSpot automation for high-growth B2B SaaS teams, with proven expertise in ABM workflows, lead scoring engines, and pipeline forecasting that drive predictable revenue. Your focus on user-behavior analytics for Enterprise aligns perfectly with my playbook for scaling ops in data-driven, security-conscious verticals. I'd be excited to explore how I can build and scale Teramind's GTM engine.

title: Head of Demand Generation & Growth
description: Cresta is hiring a Head of Demand Generation & Growth to own pipeline and revenue targets across digital channels. Requires 7+ years in B2B SaaS marketing including 3+ years in a growth leadership role, deep expertise in paid acquisition, SEO, website optimization, and analytics, plus experience with enterprise buyer journeys and ABM motions. Proficiency with Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads, GA4, HubSpot, Salesforce, Clay, n8n, SEMrush, and dashboarding tools (Looker/Tableau) is expected, along with a strong understanding of data architecture and system interconnectivity. Fully remote within the United States.
score_reason: Strong RevOps/GTM foundation and technical stack familiarity (HubSpot, Salesforce, analytics) align well, but role emphasizes demand generation and paid acquisition expertise which isn't highlighted as core strengths. Senior-level executive is slightly overqualified for a demand gen focus rather than full revenue strategy leadership.
ai_opener: Omri, I noticed your deep RevOps and B2B SaaS GTM background—Cresta is building out their Head of Demand Generation & Growth role and they're specifically looking for someone who can architect pipeline generation across digital channels while leveraging the full martech stack (HubSpot, Salesforce, GA4, and analytics infrastructure). Your experience optimizing revenue systems and forecasting would be valuable in connecting their demand motion to enterprise pipeline outcomes.

title: Head of Sales and Marketing (B2B SaaS)
description: saas.group, a fully-remote B2B SaaS portfolio company (350+ employees across 50+ countries, 23 brands), seeks a Head of Sales & Marketing to lead all commercial activities for one of its brands. You'll own the growth engine end-to-end—top-of-funnel acquisition through conversion, retention, and revenue expansion—building and optimizing both Marketing and Sales functions while working closely with the CEO.
